emailText:
Hi there,

I came across the Westport Heights Hotel website and wanted to share some honest observations based on a quick audit. No pitch - just a fresh pair of eyes.

========================================
Website Health Check - Score: 81/100
========================================

4 issues identified:

HIGH
--------------------
- 1 HTTPS mixed content
 MEDIUM
--------------------
- No blog section
 MEDIUM
--------------------
- Thin content on homepage
 MEDIUM
--------------------
- Missing alt text on gallery


WHAT'S WORKING WELL
--------------------
+ Business is established and operational
+ Has independent web presence
+ Active in local market

========================================

Your current website provider should be flagging things like this for you.

If you ever need a fresh pair of eyes or a new provider, just reach out.

Best,
David
DS Studios

issues.detail: A single HTTP element on an HTTPS page can trigger the mixed content warning.
issues.label: 1 HTTPS mixed content
issues.check: Check DevTools > Console for mixed content warnings.
issues.siteHint: Even one warning undermines visitor trust.

issues.detail: A blog provides fresh content for Google and showcases your venue to potential guests.
issues.label: No blog section
issues.check: Is there a News, Blog, or Stories section on the site?
issues.siteHint: Hotel sites with blogs get 55% more organic traffic.

issues.detail: The homepage has very little text content for search engines to index.
issues.label: Thin content on homepage
issues.check: Read the homepage. Is there less than 150 words of content?
issues.siteHint: Pages with thin content rarely rank in the top 20 of Google results.

issues.detail: Gallery images without alt text are invisible to screen readers and image search.
issues.label: Missing alt text on gallery
issues.check: Check if gallery tags have descriptive alt attributes.
issues.siteHint: Google Image Search drives 30% of venue discovery traffic.
